body_txt: Little Old Lady Investigates . Little old lady is attacked and called a witch . Little old lady kicks ass . Moral of the story: Never Mess with Granny . If you think a Mama Bear is bad, meet her Mama Bear. Maternal instinct squared ; you're pretty much screwed. She's highly likely to be the matriarch of a Badass Family . Commonly we hear her say " I Was Quite a Looker ". She may also be a Retired Badass . Older Iron Ladies will generally be this. See also: When Elders Attack , My Grandma Can Do Better Than You , Apron Matron , and "Can Hold Her Own" Moment . Often a Cool Old Lady . Note that the character must be elderly both in characterization and physical characteristics for this trope to apply; characters that are Older Than They Look or Really 700 Years Old don't count.
